# anypoint_private_space_vpns (Data Source)

Lists every VPN connection attached to a CloudHub 2.0 private space. Each entry has the same shape as the singular `anypoint_private_space_vpn` data source. Use to assert that no rogue connections exist or to fan a downstream resource over every connection.

## Example Usage

```terraform
###############################################################################
# anypoint_private_space_vpns (plural)
#
# Read every VPN connection attached to a private space. Useful for asserting
# that no rogue connection has been created out of band, or for fanning a
# downstream resource over all connections.
###############################################################################

data "anypoint_private_space_vpns" "all" {
  org_id           = var.root_org
  private_space_id = var.private_space_id
}

output "vpn_connection_ids" {
  value = [for c in data.anypoint_private_space_vpns.all.connections : c.connection_id]
}

output "vpn_connections_summary" {
  description = "name -> total vpn-member count per connection."
  value = {
    for c in data.anypoint_private_space_vpns.all.connections : c.name => length(c.vpns)
  }
}

# Example: pick a connection by display name and reference its first member's
# static routes downstream.
output "office_vpn_static_routes" {
  value = try(
    [for c in data.anypoint_private_space_vpns.all.connections : c if c.name == "office-vpn"][0].vpns[0].static_routes,
    null,
  )
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `org_id` (String) The organization id where the private space lives.
- `private_space_id` (String) The private space id.

### Read-Only

- `connections` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--connections))
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedatt--connections"></a>
### Nested Schema for `connections`

Read-Only:

- `connection_id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `vpns` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--connections--vpns))

<a id="nestedobjatt--connections--vpns"></a>
### Nested Schema for `connections.vpns`

Read-Only:

- `connection_id` (String)
- `connection_name` (String)
- `local_asn` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `remote_asn` (String)
- `remote_ip_address` (String)
- `startup_action` (String)
- `static_routes` (List of String)
- `vpn_connection_status` (String)
- `vpn_id` (String)
- `vpn_tunnels` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedobjatt--connections--vpns--vpn_tunnels))

<a id="nestedobjatt--connections--vpns--vpn_tunnels"></a>
### Nested Schema for `connections.vpns.vpn_tunnels`

Read-Only:

- `is_logs_enabled` (Boolean)
- `psk` (String)
- `ptp_cidr` (String)
